user.title: Connect to your Sunmi Printer
user.description: Enter the IP address of the Sunmi V2 Pro running the printer app. The app's HTTP server listens on port 8081 by default.

reconfigure.title: Update Sunmi Printer connection
reconfigure.description: Update the device's IP address or port, for example after it changed on your network.

error.cannot_connect: Could not reach the printer app at that address. Check the IP, port, and that the app is running.

abort.wrong_device: This is a different device than the one being reconfigured.

init.title: Sunmi Printer defaults
init.description: Defaults used when printing a plain notification (for example via notify.send_message). The dedicated print_* services always let you override these per call.
